headline: Cell Isolation Market/Cell Separation Market by Product, Cell Type, Source, Technique, Application, End User, Competition, Region - Global Forecast to 2031
summary: The cell isolation market is projected to grow from USD 4.39 billion in 2026 to USD 7.97 billion by 2031, with a CAGR of 12.7%. Key drivers include the expansion of cell and gene therapy, rising demand for immune cell isolation, and increased adoption of automated systems. Techniques like centrifugation, magnetic and fluorescence-activated cell sorting, and microfluidics enable enrichment of immune, stem, and tumor cells. The consumables segment is set to lead growth, propelled by the recurring
